F9

Hindustani Soul

Ambient Soundscape: Raag Bhairavi (Qawwali Edit)

Best experienced with headphones

Funtaztic 9 merges the rhythmic structure of Adi Talam with modern street silhouettes. Like a Qawwali performance, our footwear starts with tradition and builds into something electrifying.
